# MRC GlobalPay

> Instant crypto-to-crypto swaps with zero confirmation delays. Exchange 500+ cryptocurrencies with the best market rates in under 60 seconds. Non-custodial. No registration. 700+ liquidity sources aggregated.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://mrcglobalpay.com/)
- [Blog](https://mrcglobalpay.com/blog)
